nation: Mohawks of the Bay of Quinte
economic_notes: Band operates Loyalist Solar LP (50% via Yaote LS Solar Inc.), Ernestown Windpark LP (40% via Yaote ET Wind Inc.), Mohawk Golf Course Limited Partnership, and Belleville Affordable Housing LP (25%). ISC provided 25% of funding, OFNLP2008 provided 6.3%, Province of Ontario provided 9.2%. Culbertson Tract Settlement trust funds held. Long-Term Care facility under construction. CWJI child welfare funding significant.
notes: Prior period restatement for fiscal 2023: Belleville Affordable Housing LP income of $1,040,458 was not previously recorded. Auditor firm name not fully stated in document excerpt - identified as Belleville-based CPAs. Long-term debt includes Capital Fund CMHC mortgages ($2,729,691+), Band Operations Fund loans ($9,368,542 total per balance sheet), Yaote LS Solar loans ($14,708,433), and Yaote ET Wind loans ($6,303,564). total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $26,663,486 + Health & Welfare $3,449,044 + Other Federal $33,765,955 + Province of Ontario $9,799,633 + AIAI $1,580,597 + CMHC $2,755,730 = $77,014,445 (County of Hastings $26,920 excluded as minor/uncertain). CWJI one-time funds of $10,073,883 noted in deferred revenue but treated as deferred not one-time. Culbertson Tract Settlement property held in trust $5,255,820 with corresponding trust liability $34,412,191. Significant capital asset additions of $58M in 2024 vs $30M prior year, likely related to Long-Term Care construction.
